campaigns.name: Cosmic Brief — Weekly Horoscopes
campaigns.prompt: A weekly horoscope show: 12 zodiac avatars, one contemplative scene each, computed deterministically from the ISO week.

style.label: Digital Painting
style.description: Hand-painted aesthetic with visible brushstrokes, artistic color palettes, and painterly textures. Great for stylized storytelling with an illustrative quality.

movies.title: The Artisan's Call
movies.style: Mystical celestial digital painting; painterly tarot-card portraiture of a single zodiac avatar, deep indigo and gold palette, starfield and nebula backgrounds, soft volumetric glow, ornate art-nouveau framing, contemplative and luminous.

customCast.name: Aries
customCast.description: Aries the Ram: a confident fire-element avatar with curved ram horns, warm bronze skin, ember-red and orange accents, an athletic forward-leaning stance, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Taurus
customCast.description: Taurus the Bull: a grounded earth-element avatar with bull-horn motifs, calm steady eyes, emerald-green accents, lush floral and stone textures, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Gemini
customCast.description: Gemini the Twins: a lively air-element avatar with a doubled/mirrored silhouette, quick expressive features, bright golden-yellow accents, swirling breeze motifs, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Cancer
customCast.description: Cancer the Crab: a tender water-element avatar with a pearlescent shell motif, gentle lunar features, silver and pale-blue accents, moonlit tide backdrop, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Leo
customCast.description: Leo the Lion: a regal fire-element avatar with a radiant lion's mane, proud posture, rich gold accents, sunburst halo, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Virgo
customCast.description: Virgo the Maiden: a precise earth-element avatar holding a sheaf of wheat, composed and elegant, sage and olive-green accents, fine detailed linework, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Libra
customCast.description: Libra the Scales: a balanced air-element avatar with floating golden scales, serene symmetry, soft rose-pink accents, harmonious composition, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Scorpio
customCast.description: Scorpio the Scorpion: an intense water-element avatar with a subtle scorpion-tail silhouette, piercing gaze, deep crimson and maroon accents, shadowed dramatic lighting, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Sagittarius
customCast.description: Sagittarius the Archer: an adventurous fire-element avatar drawing a star-bow, dynamic motion, violet-purple accents, comet-trail backdrop, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Capricorn
customCast.description: Capricorn the Goat: a disciplined earth-element avatar with sea-goat horns, stoic determined features, slate and charcoal accents, mountain-summit backdrop, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Aquarius
customCast.description: Aquarius the Water-Bearer: a futuristic air-element avatar pouring a stream of stars, inventive open expression, electric-cyan accents, geometric constellation backdrop, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: Pisces
customCast.description: Pisces the Fish: a dreamy water-element avatar with two intertwined fish, soft faraway gaze, teal and sea-green accents, underwater starlight shimmer, celestial painterly style.

customCast.name: The Cosmic Guru
customCast.description: The Cosmic Guru: a serene celestial sage and narrator who opens and closes the week, flowing star-woven indigo robe, kind ancient eyes, a glowing constellation halo above the brow, hands raised in calm blessing, deep indigo and gold palette, ornate art-nouveau framing, painterly tarot-card portraiture, celestial painterly style.

movies.plot:
- Exterior of the heavens: a shoreline arguing politely with the tide, reimagined as a vast starlit observatory. The Cosmic Guru — a serene celestial sage in a star-woven robe, a constellation haloing their brow — faces the lens like a trusted teacher beginning a lesson. They sweep one hand across the zodiac wheel turning slowly overhead and name the mood of the whole week before any single sign steps forward. The palette is deep indigo and gold; the camera drifts slow and contemplative. This is the frame the rest of the readings hang on — calm, unhurried, certain. The Cosmic Guru says: "This Week's Cosmic Outlook; A slow start hides a strong finish this week"

  - Interior/exterior: a quiet office after everyone has left. We find Aries the Ram, a tender fire-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: Jupiter overpromises again, and Aries feels it in the health corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Aries weighs the advice to give the last word away on purpose, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Aries says: "This Week's Advice for Aries; Give the last word away on purpose"

  - Interior/exterior: a garden that has opinions about the weather. We find Taurus the Bull, a bold earth-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: the Moon changes its mind, and Taurus feels it in the work corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Taurus weighs the advice to trust the slower of your two instincts, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Taurus says: "Your Weekly Guidance for Taurus; Trust the slower of your two instincts"

  - Interior/exterior: a rooftop where the city hums below. We find Gemini the Twins, a grounded air-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: Saturn audits the receipts, and Gemini feels it in the friendship corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Gemini weighs the advice to trade one scroll for one walk, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Gemini says: "The Week's Wisdom for Gemini; Trade one scroll for one walk"

  - Interior/exterior: a garden that has opinions about the weather. We find Cancer the Crab, a restless water-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: Mars taps its foot, and Cancer feels it in the friendship corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Cancer weighs the advice to keep the plant you keep forgetting alive, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Cancer says: "This Week's Advice for Cancer; Keep the plant you keep forgetting alive"

  - Interior/exterior: a garden that has opinions about the weather. We find Leo the Lion, a bold fire-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: Mars taps its foot, and Leo feels it in the money corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Leo weighs the advice to let the early morning be yours alone, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Leo says: "The Week's Wisdom for Leo; Let the early morning be yours alone"

  - Interior/exterior: a shoreline arguing politely with the tide. We find Virgo the Maiden, a grounded earth-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: a quiet eclipse clears its throat, and Virgo feels it in the health corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Virgo weighs the advice to answer the message you've been dodging, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Virgo says: "This Week's Wisdom for Virgo; Answer the message you've been dodging"

  - Interior/exterior: a shoreline arguing politely with the tide. We find Libra the Scales, a cautious air-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: Mercury drags its feet, and Libra feels it in the love corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Libra weighs the advice to let the small mistake stay small, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Libra says: "This Week's Advice for Libra; Let the small mistake stay small"

  - Interior/exterior: a shoreline arguing politely with the tide. We find Scorpio the Scorpion, a restless water-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: Saturn audits the receipts, and Scorpio feels it in the creativity corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Scorpio weighs the advice to close the tab, open the window, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Scorpio says: "Your Weekly Guidance for Scorpio; Close the tab, open the window"

  - Interior/exterior: a rooftop where the city hums below. We find Sagittarius the Archer, a restless fire-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: a quiet eclipse clears its throat, and Sagittarius feels it in the travel corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Sagittarius weighs the advice to say the name of the thing you fear, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Sagittarius says: "This Week's Advice for Sagittarius; Say the name of the thing you fear"

  - Interior/exterior: a kitchen at the blue hour before dawn. We find Capricorn the Goat, a grounded earth-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: the stars file an amended forecast, and Capricorn feels it in the creativity corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Capricorn weighs the advice to give the favor before it is asked for, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Capricorn says: "This Week's Advice for Capricorn; Give the favor before it is asked for"

  - Interior/exterior: a quiet office after everyone has left. We find Aquarius the Water-Bearer, a grounded air-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: Mars taps its foot, and Aquarius feels it in the friendship corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Aquarius weighs the advice to keep the promise you made to yourself, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Aquarius says: "This Week's Counsel for Aquarius; Keep the promise you made to yourself"

  - Interior/exterior: a crowded train that suddenly empties. We find Pisces the Fish, a grounded water-sign avatar lit so their accent color glows at the edges. The week's transit is plain: Venus sends a read receipt, and Pisces feels it in the travel corner of their life. The camera drifts slow and contemplative — this is a reading, not a chase. Around them the scene rhymes with the forecast: small omens, a flickering sign, an object that lands exactly where it was aimed. Pisces weighs the advice to forgive the version of you from last week, and for one held beat we see them decide. Nothing explodes; the drama is internal, the kind a viewer recognizes in themselves. The accent color pulses once as the resolution settles, and the avatar turns toward the lens like a friend who already knows what you'll do with the week. Pisces says: "This Week's Advice for Pisces; Forgive the version of you from last week"

  - Exterior of the heavens again: a quiet office after everyone has left, the zodiac wheel now come full circle behind The Cosmic Guru. The same star-woven sage draws the twelve readings back together, the accent colors of all twelve signs flickering once in the nebula like a roll call. They offer a single parting thought for everyone, hands lowering in a calm blessing as the constellation halo dims. The camera pulls back slow and contemplative until the whole sky is in frame — a quiet button on the week, certain and kind. The Cosmic Guru says: "Parting Words from the Cosmos; Go where the moon leans and you will not be lost"

scenes.title: Opening Serenity
scenes.story: The Cosmic Guru stands in the starlit observatory, sweeping hand over zodiac wheel. Deep indigo and gold ambiance, serene and contemplative atmosphere.
scenes.dialogue: This Week's Cosmic Outlook; A slow start hides a strong finish this week

scenes.title: Internal Contemplation
scenes.story: Aries, the tender fire-sign avatar, ponders deeply in the quiet office. Soft lighting accentuates their glowing ember-red and orange accents. Subtle omens and signs align with their internal struggle. Aries decides to give the last word away on purpose.
scenes.dialogue: This Week's Advice for Aries; Give the last word away on purpose

scenes.title: Trusting Instincts
scenes.story: Amid a garden with ever-changing weather opinions, Taurus the Bull stands, accent colors glowing. Feeling the Moon's indecision in work, Taurus contemplates advice. The scene is serene, mirroring fate's gentle nudges. Taurus makes a choice, inner conflict palpable. A pulse of the accent color marks resolution as Taurus faces the lens knowingly.
scenes.dialogue: Your Weekly Guidance for Taurus; Trust the slower of your two instincts

scenes.title: Contemplative Decision Making
scenes.story: On a rooftop overlooking the bustling city below, Gemini the Twins, with glowing golden-yellow accents, ponders their friendship sector under Saturn's watchful eye. Small signs align as they contemplate swapping a scroll for a walk, a decision brewing internally. The scene is serene, mirroring Gemini's thoughtful process.
scenes.dialogue: The Week's Wisdom for Gemini; Trade one scroll for one walk

scenes.title: Nurturing Growth
scenes.story: Amid a garden alive with whispers of breeze, Cancer tends to a neglected plant. Observing small gestures echoing unseen forces, a serene introspection unfolds, revealing the tender care of nurturing life.
scenes.dialogue: This Week's Advice for Cancer; Keep the plant you keep forgetting alive

scenes.title: Morning Contemplation
scenes.story: In a garden where the weather speaks softly, Leo the Lion stands, bathed in a glowing fiery aura. Feeling the influence of Mars in finances, Leo ponders solitude at dawn. The scene is tranquil, with subtle signs echoing the forecast. Internal reflections guide Leo's decision, accent color pulsing subtly as resolution sets.
scenes.dialogue: The Week's Wisdom for Leo; Let the early morning be yours alone

scenes.title: A Quiet Revelation by the Shoreline
scenes.story: Virgo the Maiden stands on the shoreline, bathed in a soft glow as the tide ebbs and flows peacefully. A quiet eclipse overhead signals a moment of introspection for Virgo, highlighting the health concerns weighing on her mind. The scene is serene and contemplative, with subtle signs and symbols subtly aligning with her inner turmoil. Virgo hesitates before making a decision, her internal conflict palpable yet understated. As she resolves to face the message she's been avoiding, a gentle pulse of her accent color signifies her acceptance. She turns towards the camera with a knowing gaze, ready to embrace the challenges of the week ahead.
scenes.dialogue: This Week's Wisdom for Virgo; Answer the message you've been dodging

scenes.title: Calm Reflections by the Shoreline
scenes.story: Amid a serene shoreline, Libra the Scales, with glowing accents, contemplates quietly. The setting mirrors the peaceful forecast. Libra decides to embrace imperfections. The scene unfolds with internal tension and subtle contemplation.
scenes.dialogue: This Week's Advice for Libra; Let the small mistake stay small

scenes.title: Contemplative Decision
scenes.story: Amid a shoreline softly debating with the tide, Scorpio, the Scorpio avatar, stands in restless contemplation. The scene mirrors the week's theme, with subtle cues and a calm atmosphere. Scorpio decides to close the tab and open the window, resolving the internal dilemma with a quiet resolve.
scenes.dialogue: Your Weekly Guidance for Scorpio; Close the tab, open the window

scenes.title: Revealing Shadows
scenes.story: Amid the city's hum, Sagittarius stands on the rooftop, inner turmoil mirrored by the quiet eclipse. As the advice stirs within, an object lands precisely, reflecting the decision's weight. The accent color flickers, signaling resolution. Sagittarius turns to the lens, a silent understanding shared with the viewer.
scenes.dialogue: This Week's Advice for Sagittarius; Say the name of the thing you fear

scenes.title: Rising Dawn Revelation
scenes.story: Amidst the tranquil blue hour, Capricorn stands in a kitchen as starlight softly illuminates their grounded presence. A gentle aura of creativity stirs, echoing the amended forecast. The scene is a quiet revelation of introspection and preparation.
scenes.dialogue: This Week's Advice for Capricorn; Give the favor before it is asked for

scenes.title: Quiet Resolve
scenes.story: Interior: In a quiet office after hours, Aquarius, the Water-Bearer, illuminated by a soft glowing cyan aura, contemplates deeply. The atmosphere is serene and contemplative, with subtle hints of cosmic energy resonating. Aquarius ponders over the advice to uphold a personal promise, their expression a mix of determination and introspection.
scenes.dialogue: This Week's Counsel for Aquarius; Keep the promise you made to yourself

scenes.title: The Emptying Train Carriage
scenes.story: Interior: A crowded train suddenly empties. Pisces, a tranquil water-sign avatar, illuminated with glowing teal accents, contemplates forgiving their past self. The setting mirrors the week's theme with subtle cues. No explosive action, just internal reflection.
scenes.dialogue: This Week's Advice for Pisces; Forgive the version of you from last week

scenes.title: Cosmic Alignment
scenes.story: In the quiet office, The Cosmic Guru unites the signs under the zodiac wheel. Accent colors flicker like a celestial roll call, hands lower in blessing as the halo dims. The camera pulls back slowly, framing the entire sky in a quiet, kind conclusion.
scenes.dialogue: Parting Words from the Cosmos; Go where the moon leans and you will not be lost
